prose:
Frontier orbital calculation on aniline (14 atoms: C₆H₅NH₂) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet). Exact four-centre integrals (density fitting OFF). Geometry taken from the user-supplied .xyz file; no re-optimization at this level (single-point). SCF converged in 9 cycles.

Key results:
- HOMO (index 24): −5.553772 eV
- LUMO (index 25): −0.2489544 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap: 5.3048177 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap)
- Total energy: −287.71578 Hartree

No warnings were reported by the engine. integrity.trustworthy = true, status = ok.
